title: Fig. 5 in A Review of the Mongolian Cretaceous Dinosaur Saurornithoides (Troodontidae: Theropoda)
author: Norell, Mark A.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 5. Photograph of a cast made from the original block containing the preserved postcranium of Saurornithoides mongoliensis. Individual elements were removed and prepared in isolation after the block was cast.
steps_raw: Fig. 5. Photograph of a cast made from the original block containing the preserved postcranium of Saurornithoides mongoliensis. Individual elements were removed and prepared in isolation after the block was cast.
